scripts.prepaper:session: npm run env:init && npm run build
scripts.predry-run:service: npm run env:init && npm run build
scripts.pm2:start:dry-run: npm run env:init && npm run prepare:runtime-dirs && npm run build && pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs --only dry-run-manager
scripts.pm2:restart:dry-run: npm run env:init && npm run prepare:runtime-dirs && npm run build && node scripts/restart-pm2-dry-run.mjs
